title: Recommendation: Syphilis Infection During Pregnancy: Screening | United States Preventive Services Taskforce
text:
tilingual materials for patients on syphilis prenatal screening ( https://www.cdc.gov/sti/php/communication-resources/syphilis-prenatal-screening-protect-your-baby.html ). 
Where to read the full recommendation statement? 
Visit the USPSTF website ( https://www.uspreventiveservicestaskforce.org/ ) or the JAMA website ( https://jamanetwork.com/collections/44068/united-states-preventive-services-task-force ) to read the full recommendation statement. This includes more details on the rationale of the recommendation, including benefits and harms; supporting evidence; and recommendations of others. 
The USPSTF recognizes that clinical decisions involve more considerations than evidence alone. Clinicians should understand the evidence but individualize decision-making to the specific patient or situation.
